name: analyze_handwriting_math_tool
description: Specialized tool for recognizing, transcribing, and semantically interpreting handwritten mathematical content from educational documents. ONLY use for: handwritten equations, algebraic work, geometric figures with labels, function graphs, solution chains, worked examples, math lecture notes, homework, exams, and any mathematical notation written by hand. Extracts LaTeX, solution logic, geometric figure properties (vertices, sides, angles, congruence marks), and color-coded annotations. NOT for: printed/typed math, plain handwritten text without math, diagrams without mathematical content, or tables. If no handwritten mathematical content is found, returns that no content was detected.

image_path.description: S3 URL (s3://bucket/key) or absolute file path to the image. Use this OR image_data, not both.

image_data.description: Base64-encoded image data. Use this OR image_path, not both. Preferred when image is already in memory.

aws_profile.description: Optional AWS profile name for Bedrock authentication. If not provided, uses default AWS credentials

result.description: Analysis result from Handwriting Math Analyzer
